productName: Cannabis Northwest - Infused Pre-Rolls (2 x .5g) - Grease Monkey - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Grease Monkey flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of skunk, earthy, and pungent, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
